name: Grand Champion Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together the flour, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, beat the sugar and oil with an electric mixer on high until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Then add the pumpkin.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and water to the sugar mixture, beating well after each addition (use a mixer set on low speed).
5. Stir in the chopped dates. Pour the batter into two greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 55 minutes or until a cake tester or wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Let cool in the pans on wire racks for 10 minutes. Then remove from the pans and continue cooling on the racks.
